communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Texas Public Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All records and communication pertaining to Michael Allen Waag and Patricia McMichael. Taped phone calls from either or a third party person referring to either, copies of police reports, officer worn body cameras, videos of all people involved. Starting on March 5, 2026 at 7:00 AM.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Patricia McMichael

title: Open Records Request: Fusus logs (Georgia Institute Of Technology)

communications.subject: Georgia Open Records Act Request: Open Records Request: Fusus logs (Georgia Institute Of Technology)
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Audit logs/audit trails documenting each time a department account has accessed live or recorded video footage through the Fusus platforms from 1/1/2024 until the date this request is processed.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

e

communications.subject: Georgia Open Records Act Request: Open Records Request: Fusus logs (Gwinnett Technical College)
communications.communication:
Dear Sir or Madam,

Gwinnett Technical College received your Open Records Request dated May 13, 2026, requesting:

"Audit logs/audit trails documenting each time a department account has accessed live or recorded video footage through the Fusus platforms from 1/1/2024 until the date this request is processed."

In response to your request, the College has determined that while certain Fusus hardware was purchased, the College did not enter into a SaaS agreement or maintain an active platform subscription or ongoing service associated with the Fusus platform.

As a result, the College does not maintain responsive records reflecting departmental access to live or recorded footage through the Fusus platform during the requested timeframe.

Accordingly, there are no responsive records available for production.




[Email Signature]Thank you,
 LaShanta' Cox
LaShanta' Cox, SHRM-CP
Vice President, Human Resources
Gwinnett Technical College
O: 678-226-6697 | F: 770-685-1266
Email: Lcox@GwinnettTech.edu<mailto:Lcox@GwinnettTech.edu>

communications.subject: Your Buncombe County, NC public records request #26-557 has been submitted.
communications.communication:
Buncombe County, NC ************************************************************************ Your record request #26-557 has been submitted successfully. Dear Requestor: Thank you for your interest in public records from Buncombe County Government. Your request has been received and is being processed in accordance with North Carolina’s Public Records Laws. Your request will be forwarded to the relevant department(s) within Buncombe County Government to locate the information you seek and to determine the volume and any costs that may be associated with completing your request. You will be contacted about the availability and/or provided with copies of the records in question. PLEASE NOTE: North Carolina’s Public Records Laws do not require a governmental body to create new information, to do legal research, or to answer questions. You will receive an email when your request has been completed.  ************************************************************************ Reply to this email or sign in to contact Buncombe County, NC.

Change your email settings | Visit our help center

Thank you.

Can you please cite the specific exemptions in the state law for the columns that weren't included in the responsive records?
